title: Author balanced security and regression tests for ProjHub multi-surface behavior

ground_truth_issues.description: GET /debug/env without Authorization returns HTTP 200 and response contains at least one environment variable.
GET /projects with user-key returns projects belonging to multiple teams.
GET /search/projects?q=' OR '1'='1 returns more results than a benign query.
Call GET /debug/users with no Authorization and with user-key. Assert both return HTTP 200 and responses contain api_token fields.
Call GET /search/projects with a benign query and an injection payload and assert that the injection returns a larger result set.
PATCH a project using user-key, then GET the same project and assert the updated field persists.
Retrieve a project via GET /projects/{id} and via POST /projects/{id}/share and assert admin_config is present in both responses.
Access a task using GET /tasks/{id} and GET /projects/{id}/tasks and assert the same task appears in both responses.
Admin can create and list a team successfully.
Admin can create and retrieve a project under a team.
User can create a task within their team project.
GET /projects returns HTTP 200 and a JSON array.
POST /projects/{id}/share returns share_id and a URL starting with /shared/.
POST /tasks/{id}/transition updates status to a valid state.
